title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on food sustainability and global challenges.

questions.question: Do you think people should be encouraged to eat less meat? How could this be achieved?
How serious a problem do you think food waste is in modern society?

script.text: Some people say that the globalisation of food culture is causing us to lose our traditional food heritage. Do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
